kenneth walker.text: Chiefs rebuilt the offense around more structure, more accountability, and more run game. KC wants a real run game for the first time in years - made a point to get Kenneth Walker. Walker should destroy if he stays healthy. Their breakout pick is Xavier Worthy

xavier worthy.text: If that was actually Xavier Worthy running around in the grass, @HaydenWinks owes everyone an apology

Chiefs rebuilt the offense around more structure, more accountability, and more run game. KC wants a real run game for the first time in years - made a point to get Kenneth Walker. Walker should destroy if he stays healthy. Their breakout pick is Xavier Worthy

aaron rodgers.text: Aaron Rodgers ranked 35th in the NFL in deep throw percentage in 2025 at just 9.4% (@FantasyPtsData). Michael Pittman's PPR ppg fantasy finishes the last 5 years: 2021 - 28th 2022 - 25th 2023 - 14th 2024 - 47th 2025 - 26th Current ADP: WR41

jack bech.text: "Jack Bech and Dont'e Thornton Jr. are both looking to grow in their sophomore campaigns. Despite earning prominent roles in the offense last training camp, rookie pains and team challenges arose. Bech seemed to be more comfortable within the offense late in the season"

donte thornton.text: "Jack Bech and Dont'e Thornton Jr. are both looking to grow in their sophomore campaigns. Despite earning prominent roles in the offense last training camp, rookie pains and team challenges arose. Bech seemed to be more comfortable within the offense late in the season"

pat bryant.text: Not in the article, but on a given play a max of 5 players can run a route - it usually averages: 2 short routes, 2 intermediate, 1 deep. Waddle + RB/TE will work short/intermediate; Pat Bryant + Waddle/TE intermediate; Sutton deep

marvin harrison.text: Rome Odunze has a career YPRR of 1.33 Marvin Harrison has a career YPRR of 1.61 If one of these WRs is going to make a Y3 leap I'm betting on the far better prospect -- who has also been better in the NFL despite being talked about as a far larger disappointment

matthew stafford.text: Steve and Sam debate where Matthew Stafford falls in the top QB conversation “If you really look at Stafford's five-year career with the Rams, the Super Bowl run was excellent. 2022 was a disappointment, 2023 was excellent and underrated, and 2024 was a disappointment for”

jaxon smith njigba.text: Jaxon Smith-Njigba 2025 #ReceptionPerception Profile. Some highlights: - 77.8% success rate vs. man coverage (94th percentile) - 82.5% success rate vs. zone - 80% success rate vs. press. RP helps show that JSN was pretty convincingly among the best, if not the premier, route runner

josh jacobs.text: For Josh Jacobs I am slightly worried about the pile up of right leg injuries with the amount of touches he's had
